tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: With only ten percent left and no competing deadlines, I can prioritize finishing this assignment immediately to secure a clean submission before the 13:30 cutoff.

I misjudged the timeline; despite planning to finish before 13:30, I only reached 95% as the deadline just passed. This failure highlights a critical gap between my deliberate planning and actual execution speed.
The missed 13:30 cutoff confirms my planning gap; I am now at 99% completion with the deadline passed, forcing a renegotiation of submission terms.

desires: Secure an acceptable grade for this assignment before the professor's patience evaporates completely.
Re-establish credibility with my team and cohort by demonstrating that I can deliver on promises, even if it requires renegotiating terms now.
Stop the mental loop of self-blame regarding my execution gap so I can focus entirely on finishing the remaining 1.2%.

goals.description: Submit the assignment at 98.7% progress immediately to lock in a passing grade, accepting that the final 1.2% is a sunk cost compared to the catastrophic failure of missing the Mon 13:30 deadline.
goals.rationale: My academic standing is non-negotiable. As an Assertive persona, I will not let perfectionism derail the outcome when the penalty for lateness outweighs the marginal gain of completion. The cost of the missing 1.2% is negligible compared to the zero-grade risk.

goals.description: Draft a concise, direct email to the professor acknowledging the timing issue and requesting leniency on grading criteria based on the near-complete work.
goals.rationale: I must manage this relationship proactively; hiding the mistake invites worse consequences. This protects my long-term reputation while I recover from today's misjudgment, but only after the submission is locked down.

goals.description: Execute a strict wind-down routine within 30 minutes of submission to mitigate accumulating sleep debt.
goals.rationale: While health is important, the immediate academic crisis takes precedence. However, given my high sleep discipline value, I cannot ignore this entirely; it is deferred until the submission and email are locked down to ensure tomorrow's focus capacity remains viable.

agent.last_reasoning: I must finish this assignment immediately to secure the grade before the deadline passes. This prioritizes my academic standing over social connection, but I will text my teammate post-submission so they don't feel neglected while I focus on this critical task.

goals.description: Sprint to finish the final 10% of the assignment and submit by 13:30 to lock in the grade and eliminate late penalties.
goals.rationale: As an Achievement-oriented persona, my GPA is a non-negotiable metric. The risk of a late penalty directly threatens my academic standing, so this requires immediate, focused execution over all other distractions.

goals.description: Aggressively ignore the note tidying task; it is a 'soft' distraction that must not bleed into my focus until the deadline passes.
goals.rationale: Assertiveness dictates setting boundaries against low-value tasks. This task offers no future payoff compared to the assignment and serves only as a procrastination trap given my current sleep debt.

desires: Submit this assignment before 13:30 to lock in the A and eliminate the risk of a late penalty that would undermine my semester GPA.
Finish the remaining 10% without letting the 'soft' note tidying task bleed into my focus or become an excuse to delay the hard work.
Avoid feeling like I'm failing at time management again, especially since I already have two hours of sleep debt.
